title: arctium lasiandrum
intro: Arctium lasiandrum, also known as the prickly burdock or wild burdock, is a biennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, phenolic acids, and essential oils. The medicinal properties of Arctium lasiandrum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Arctium lasiandrum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and dried root, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
